turns.query: Help me investigate the root causes of air quality deterioration in Luancheng District on 2025-03-30, examining industrial clusters, weather patterns, and meteorological factors.
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 查找鹿城区的district_id
query_district = text("""
SELECT d.id, d.name, c.name as city_name 
FROM district d 
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id 
WHERE d.name LIKE '%鹿城%'
""")
district_df = pd.read_sql(query_district, engine)
print("鹿城区信息:")
print(district_df)

# 2. 获取2025-03-30鹿城区小时级AQI数据
if not district_df.empty:
    district_id = district_df.iloc[0]['id']
    
    query_aqi = text("""
    SELECT timestamp, aqi, air_quality_level, pm2_5, pm10, so2, no2, o3, o3_8h, co, primary_pollutants
    FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
    WHERE district_id = :district_id 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY timestamp
    """)
    aqi_df = pd.read_sql(query_aqi, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
    print(f"\nAQI数据记录数: {len(aqi_df)}")
    print(aqi_df.head(10))
    
    # 3. 获取2025-03-30鹿城区气象数据
    query_weather = text("""
    SELECT timestamp, temperature, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, humidity, wind_speed
    FROM hourly_district_weather 
    WHERE district_id = :district_id 
    AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY timestamp
    """)
    weather_df = pd.read_sql(query_weather, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
    print(f"\n气象数据记录数: {len(weather_df)}")
    print(weather_df.head(10))
    
    # 4. 获取该日鹿城区主要工业企业及其排放数据
    query_companies = text("""
    SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.address
    FROM polluting_company pc
    WHERE pc.district_id = :district_id
    """)
    companies_df = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
    print(f"\n区内污染企业数: {len(companies_df)}")
    print(companies_df)
    
    # 5. 获取这些企业2025-03-30的排放数据
    if not companies_df.empty:
        company_ids = companies_df['id'].tolist()
        query_emission = text("""
        SELECT company_id, timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2
        FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission 
        WHERE company_id = ANY(:company_ids)
        AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
        AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
        ORDER BY timestamp
        """)
        emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine, params={'company_ids': company_ids})
        print(f"\n企业排放记录数: {len(emission_df)}")
        print(emission_df.head(20))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试更广泛的搜索，可能名称不完全匹配
query_district = text("""
SELECT d.id, d.name, c.name as city_name 
FROM district d 
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id 
WHERE d.name LIKE '%城%'
ORDER BY d.name
LIMIT 20
""")
district_df = pd.read_sql(query_district, engine)
print("包含'城'字的区县:")
print(district_df)

# 如果还是没有，查看所有区县
query_all_districts = text("""
SELECT d.id, d.name, c.name as city_name 
FROM district d 
JOIN city c ON d.city_id = c.id 
ORDER BY c.name, d.name
""")
all_districts = pd.read_sql(query_all_districts, engine)
print("\n所有区县:")
print(all_districts)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 使用栾城区（id=8）进行分析
district_id = 8
district_name = "栾城区"
city_name = "石家庄市"

# 1. 获取2025-03-30栾城区小时级AQI数据
query_aqi = text("""
SELECT timestamp, aqi, air_quality_level, pm2_5, pm10, so2, no2, o3, o3_8h, co, primary_pollutants
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
aqi_df = pd.read_sql(query_aqi, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print(f"栾城区AQI数据记录数: {len(aqi_df)}")
print(aqi_df.to_string())

# 2. 获取2025-03-30栾城区气象数据
query_weather = text("""
SELECT timestamp, temperature, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, humidity, wind_speed
FROM hourly_district_weather 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
weather_df = pd.read_sql(query_weather, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print(f"\n气象数据记录数: {len(weather_df)}")
print(weather_df.to_string())

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 计算任务要求的指标
district_id = 8

# 1. 计算AQI统计指标
query_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
    SUM(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exceedance_hours,
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour_of_day
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
""")
stats_df = pd.read_sql(query_stats, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("AQI统计指标:")
print(stats_df)

# 获取峰值小时
query_peak_hour = text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int as peak_hour
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY aqi DESC
LIMIT 1
""")
peak_hour_df = pd.read_sql(query_peak_hour, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print(f"\n峰值小时: {peak_hour_df.iloc[0]['peak_hour']}")

# 2. 获取区内污染企业
query_companies = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.address
FROM polluting_company pc
WHERE pc.district_id = :district_id
""")
companies_df = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print(f"\n区内污染企业数: {len(companies_df)}")
print(companies_df)

# 3. 获取企业排放数据
if not companies_df.empty:
    company_ids = companies_df['id'].tolist()
    query_emission = text("""
    SELECT company_id, timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission 
    WHERE company_id = ANY(:company_ids)
    AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY timestamp
    """)
    emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine, params={'company_ids': company_ids})
    print(f"\n企业排放记录数: {len(emission_df)}")
    print(emission_df.head(30))
    
    # 按企业汇总排放
    company_emission_summary = emission_df.groupby('company_id').agg({
        'exhaust_gas': 'sum',
        'nox': 'sum',
        'so2': 'sum',
        'pm': 'sum',
        'co': 'sum',
        'no2': 'sum'
    }).reset_index()
    print("\n企业排放汇总:")
    print(company_emission_summary)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

district_id = 8

# 1. 计算AQI统计指标
query_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi,
    SUM(CASE WHEN aqi > 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exceedance_hours
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
""")
stats_df = pd.read_sql(query_stats, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("AQI统计指标:")
print(stats_df)

# 获取峰值小时
query_peak_hour = text("""
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int as peak_hour
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY aqi DESC
LIMIT 1
""")
peak_hour_df = pd.read_sql(query_peak_hour, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
peak_hour = int(peak_hour_df.iloc[0]['peak_hour'])
print(f"\n峰值小时: {peak_hour}")

# 2. 获取区内污染企业
query_companies = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.address
FROM polluting_company pc
WHERE pc.district_id = :district_id
""")
companies_df = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print(f"\n区内污染企业数: {len(companies_df)}")
print(companies_df)

# 3. 获取企业排放数据
if not companies_df.empty:
    company_ids = companies_df['id'].tolist()
    query_emission = text("""
    SELECT company_id, timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, co, no2
    FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission 
    WHERE company_id = ANY(:company_ids)
    AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
    AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
    ORDER BY timestamp
    """)
    emission_df = pd.read_sql(query_emission, engine, params={'company_ids': company_ids})
    print(f"\n企业排放记录数: {len(emission_df)}")
    print(emission_df.head(30))
    
    # 按企业汇总排放
    company_emission_summary = emission_df.groupby('company_id').agg({
        'exhaust_gas': 'sum',
        'nox': 'sum',
        'so2': 'sum',
        'pm': 'sum',
        'co': 'sum',
        'no2': 'sum'
    }).reset_index()
    print("\n企业排放汇总:")
    print(company_emission_summary)

# 4. 获取气象数据
query_weather = text("""
SELECT timestamp, temperature, wind_direction, wind_degree, wind_scale, humidity, wind_speed
FROM hourly_district_weather 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
weather_df = pd.read_sql(query_weather, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("\n气象数据:")
print(weather_df.to_string())

# 5. 获取气象统计
query_weather_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(temperature) as avg_temp,
    MIN(temperature) as min_temp,
    MAX(temperature) as max_temp,
    AVG(humidity) as avg_humidity,
    AVG(wind_speed) as avg_wind_speed,
    MIN(wind_speed) as min_wind_speed,
    AVG(wind_scale) as avg_wind_scale
FROM hourly_district_weather 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
""")
weather_stats_df = pd.read_sql(query_weather_stats, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("\n气象统计:")
print(weather_stats_df)

# 6. 获取PM10小时浓度统计
query_pm10_stats = text("""
SELECT 
    AVG(pm10) as avg_pm10,
    MAX(pm10) as max_pm10,
    MIN(pm10) as min_pm10,
    AVG(pm2_5) as avg_pm2_5,
    MAX(pm2_5) as max_pm2_5
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
""")
pm10_stats_df = pd.read_sql(query_pm10_stats, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("\n颗粒物统计:")
print(pm10_stats_df)

# 赋值给变量
mean_aqi = float(stats_df['mean_aqi'].iloc[0])
max_aqi = float(stats_df['max_aqi'].iloc[0])
exceedance_hours = int(stats_df['exceedance_hours'].iloc[0])
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = peak_hour

print(f"\n最终结果:")
print(f"mean_aqi: {mean_aqi}")
print(f"max_aqi: {max_aqi}")
print(f"exceedance_hours: {exceedance_hours}")
print(f"peak_aqi_hour_of_day: {peak_aqi_hour_of_day}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

district_id = 8

# 获取主要污染物分布统计
query_primary_pollutant = text("""
SELECT 
    primary_pollutants,
    COUNT(*) as hour_count,
    ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as avg_aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
GROUP BY primary_pollutants
ORDER BY avg_aqi DESC
""")
primary_pollutant_df = pd.read_sql(query_primary_pollutant, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("主要污染物分布:")
print(primary_pollutant_df)

# 获取空气质量等级分布
query_aqi_level = text("""
SELECT 
    air_quality_level,
    COUNT(*) as hour_count,
    ROUND(AVG(aqi), 2) as avg_aqi,
    MIN(aqi) as min_aqi,
    MAX(aqi) as max_aqi
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
GROUP BY air_quality_level
ORDER BY avg_aqi DESC
""")
aqi_level_df = pd.read_sql(query_aqi_level, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("\n空气质量等级分布:")
print(aqi_level_df)

# 获取PM10和PM2.5的小时变化
query_pollutants_hourly = text("""
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)::int as hour,
    aqi,
    pm2_5,
    pm10,
    so2,
    no2,
    o3,
    o3_8h,
    co
FROM hourly_district_air_quality 
WHERE district_id = :district_id 
AND timestamp >= '2025-03-30 00:00:00' 
AND timestamp < '2025-03-31 00:00:00'
ORDER BY hour
""")
pollutants_hourly_df = pd.read_sql(query_pollutants_hourly, engine, params={'district_id': district_id})
print("\n污染物小时变化:")
print(pollutants_hourly_df.to_string())

# 赋值给变量
mean_aqi = float(56.166667)
max_aqi = float(71)
exceedance_hours = int(0)
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = 7

print(f"\n最终结果:")
print(f"mean_aqi: {mean_aqi}")
print(f"max_aqi: {max_aqi}")
print(f"exceedance_hours: {exceedance_hours}")
print(f"peak_aqi_hour_of_day: {peak_aqi_hour_of_day}")

# 存储最终结果
mean_aqi = 56.166667
max_aqi = 71.0
exceedance_hours = 0
peak_aqi_hour_of_day = 7

max_aqi = 71.0
exceedance_hours = 0
